arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'in three-team battle' for £10.1m Premier League defender
arts.sum: Barcelona and Chelsea are reportedly in direct competition to sign Nottingham Forest's Murillo, in spite of the fact that the defender has just signed a new contract.
